prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar AJ-V8 5.0L supercharged (AJ133) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (12psi boost), paired with a custom Bell Intercoolers front-mount intercooler (Defender 130-specific end tanks) and a Motec M150 ECU for full standalone control, including individual cylinder fuel trims and launch control

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (front and rear) and a Paddy Hopkirk Motorsport 6-speed ZF manual conversion (Defender 130-specific bellhousing and hydraulic clutch system), paired with a Southdown Engineering 4.88:1 gear set for rock-crawling torque multiplication

Suspension overhaul with a custom Öhlins TTX40 coilover kit (Defender 130-specific valving, 300mm travel front, 350mm rear) and a TeraFlex JK Unlimited 4-link rear suspension conversion (with Currie Antirock sway bars), paired with Hutchinson Beadlock wheels (17x9 ET15) wrapped in 37x12.5R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a JE Motorsport Defender 130 Expedition Overland kit (aluminum fender flares, integrated rock sliders, and rear quarter-panel extensions), finished in a custom Cerakote Satin Bronze with hand-brushed matte black accents

Front bumper replacement with a Mantec Extreme HD winch bumper (Defender 130-specific, 12,000lb Warn Zeon winch, integrated Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar, and a custom ARB twin compressor mount for onboard air)

Interior rework with a full Sparco Pro 2000 seat kit (6-point harnesses, Defender 130-specific mounting brackets), a custom aluminum dash overlay (CNC-machined, featuring a RaceLogic VBOX Sport display and a Motec C127 dash logger), and a full roll cage by Safety Devices (Defender 130-specific, FIA-certified, with integrated harness bar)
